word: G2691 - καταστρηνιάω - katastrēniáō - kat-as-tray-nee-ah'-o - Begin to wax wanton against

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Begin to wax wanton against
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to feel the impulses of sexual desire
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G2596 and G4763; to become voluptuous against: - begin to wax wanton against.
